argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/video/"]')); const seen = new Set(); const results = []; for (const a of links) { const href = a.href; if (seen.has(href)) continue; seen.add(href); const match = href.match(/@([^/]+)\/video\/(\d+)/); results.push({ rank: results.length + 1, author: match ? match[1] : '', views: a.textContent.trim() || '-', url: href }); if (results.length >= limit) break; } return results; }

description: Get trending TikTok videos from explore page
name: Explore
